name: Dev Server — Autonomous Development Environment
description: Provisions and manages isolated Hetzner dev servers with GitHub Copilot CLI for autonomous coding tasks. Maya can spin up a server, clone a repo, instruct Copilot to fix bugs or build features, fetch Playwright screenshots as proof of work, and deploy to staging after approval.

HETZNER_DEV_PROJECT_API.description: Hetzner Cloud API key for the dev project

GH_TOKEN.description: GitHub OAuth token (with copilot scope). Use the Login with GitHub button to obtain this via the CLI.

project_bindings.description: Bind each project to the channel group it receives requests from. Maya will automatically know which project context to apply.
